summary: R-1 is structurally sound: the seam is actually centralized for the narrow format/descriptor atom set, behavior-preserving calls are unchanged at their seams, and the characterisation lock contract is extended only additively.
next_steps: Re-run the lock command immediately at this commit boundary (including `test_image-pin-charlock.bats`) after any R-2 changes, then again after each green commit before moving to R-3.
